_meta.role: 緊張兮兮的年輕女吟遊詩人，Kenneth 之妻；怕蜘蛛，琉特琴中老有蜘蛛爬出。掌管慈悲真言『mu』之知識。

translations.note: 人名；len=3，單字『南』占 2 bytes，留 1 byte 空位
描述句；避用『年』（5C trail）改用『輕』；改寫為『緊張的年輕吟遊女』——『年』0xA67E 不在 5C；確認

translations.en: "I would play for thee, but I'm worried about my lute."
translations.zh: 「本欲為汝彈奏一曲，奈何放心不下我的琉特琴。」

translations.note: Lady Nan 譯為『南夫人』，女性自稱『妾身』

translations.en: "Every time I pick up my lute, @spiders crawl out of it."
translations.zh: 「每回拾起琉特琴，便有@spiders（蜘蛛）自琴中爬出。」

translations.en: "There must be hundreds of them nesting in there!"
translations.zh: 「裡頭怕是有上百隻在築巢吧！」

translations.en: "I hate spiders! They're creepy, ugly, disgusting things! Why won't they leave me alone?"
translations.zh: 「妾身恨蜘蛛！那等噁心、醜陋、令人毛骨悚然之物！為何就不肯放過我？」

translations.en: Iolo says to her, "Now, now, my dear. Have you forgotten about the @gloves I gave you?"
translations.zh: 尤洛對她說：「好啦好啦，親愛的。莫非汝忘了我送的那雙@gloves（手套）？」

translations.en: "Oh, yes. Perhaps if I wore those I could play..."
translations.zh: 「啊，是了。倘若戴上那副，便能彈奏了……」

translations.en: "Iolo gave them to me for my birthday."
"Yes, I know of the @Rune and @Mantra of Compassion."
translations.zh: 「是的，妾身知曉@Rune（符文）之@Mantra（真言）與真言。」

translations.en: "The Mantra of Compassion is 'mu.' Is that a spider on your shoulder?"
translations.zh: 「慈悲之真言乃『mu』。汝肩上那是隻蜘蛛麼？」
translations.note: 保留 'mu' ASCII；Nan 又恐慌看見蜘蛛

translations.en: "No, 'tis just a trick of the light."
"'Twas given to our most promising student, young @Ariana."
translations.zh: 「乃贈予我等最有前途之高徒——小@Ariana（艾莉）安娜。」

translations.en: "She's very talented. She'll go far, if the spiders don't get her..."
translations.zh: 「她極具天賦，前途無量，只要蜘蛛別找上她……」

translations.en: "Fare thee well, and watch thy step! The spiders are lurking everywhere."
translations.zh: 「祝汝一路平安，慎走每一步！蜘蛛無處不在。」

riddles_additions.en: The Mantra of Compassion is 'mu.' Is that a spider on your shoulder?
riddles_additions.zh: 慈悲之真言乃『mu』。汝肩上那是隻蜘蛛麼？
riddles_additions.ref: Nan 一邊傳授真言一邊神經質地誤認蜘蛛
riddles_additions.strategy: mantra 音節 'mu' 保留 ASCII，承襲 Mariah 章程

riddles_additions.ref: Nan 招牌焦慮口吻；告別時也不忘恐嚇

translator_notes: Nan 神經質、纖細、自稱『妾身』。蜘蛛恐懼貫穿全段；多處用『便』『奈何』『莫非』等文言虛詞點綴。傳授真言 'mu' 保留 ASCII（與 Mariah 系統一致）。
